##RRUFFID=R120105
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaZn(SiO_4_)·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Christmas mine, Christmas, Gila County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Transparent colorless prismatic crystals, associated with blue kinoite and colorless platy junitoite, R120100.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120105
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
